rules.font_weights: Use font-light for elegance and font-bold for impact. Avoid defaulting to regular weight everywhere.

rules.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance (4.5:1 for normal text). Use text-shadow over images. Always explicitly set hover colors.
rules.tints: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Always tint greys with the primary green/warm hue.

surfaces.cards: Solid background (#FFFFFF) with a 1px subtle border (rgba(15, 56, 33, 0.1)). Max 12px border radius. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Used for sticky headers, mobile bottom nav, and floating AI assistant. backdrop-blur-xl with rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) and a 1px solid inner border (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)). Never use complete transparency.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle paper grain/noise overlay on the cinematic landing page to break digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone style for premium feel, Regular for dense data).

components.button: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions, subtle hover lift and color transition. Primary CTA uses brand primary (#0F3821) with inverse text.
components.cards: Premium cards with generous internal padding (p-6 to p-8). Avoid generic dropshadows. Use 1px borders and colored accents.
components.navigation: Desktop: Fixed Sidebar for Dashboards. Mobile: Glassmorphic Bottom Navigation. Landing Page: Sticky glassmorphic header.
components.inputs: Use Shadcn customized components. Solid borders, active ring in brand secondary.
components.video_player: Used in the Tutorial center. Custom controls, subtle shadow, rounded-2xl.
components.floating_ai: KrishiAI assistant accessible via floating circular button with pulsing rings, opens a sliding/popover glass chat interface.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy: p-4 to p-12. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For dashboards: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Summary cards col-span-1, charts col-span-2 or 3.
grids_and_layouts.hero_section: Cinematic split or full-screen with max overlay bg-black/40 (if using image) to keep subjects visible.
grids_and_layouts.split_screen: Login/Signup should use a premium split-screen layout: left side form, right side cinematic agricultural storytelling image.
grids_and_layouts.mobile_first: Ensure all layout grids default to grid-cols-1. Max image height on mobile is 80vh.

motion.landing_page: High motion: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling. Parallax on the hero section. Staggered fade-up for features.
motion.dashboards: Minimalist motion: Staggered entry for lists, hover state lifts for cards. Do not overload with distracting animations.
motion.accessibility: CRITICAL: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Disable all non-essential animations when requested. Provide static fallback for hero video.

hero_background.description: Green corn field under sunrise. Use for the cinematic landing page fallback or main hero image.

modern_farmer.description: Mature farmer standing in lush sunflower field using a tablet. Use for technology feature or split-screen login.

harvest.description: Close-up of hands pulling freshly harvested onions. Use for Market or Exchange section.

cofounder_aman.description: Portrait of a confident man with crossed arms. Use for Aman Barnwal in the About section.

cofounder_swastika.description: Confident woman in business attire smiling. Use for Swastika Kumari in the About section.

video.hero_video: For the cinematic hero background, implement a subtle, high-quality looping video of Indian agriculture. Ensure to wrap with Suspense and provide the 'hero_background' image as a poster and fallback.

libraries_and_3d.ui_components: shadcn/ui (highly customized). Do not use generic html elements for complex interactive elements.
libraries_and_3d.motion: framer-motion for interactions, react-spring if needed for parallax.
libraries_and_3d.scroll: @studio-freight/react-lenis for premium momentum scrolling on the landing page.
libraries_and_3d.charts: recharts or shadcn charts for Mandi prices and demand analytics.
libraries_and_3d.toast: sonner for all alerts and notifications.

accessibility.contrast: Must meet APCA/WCAG AA standards. Text on images MUST have text-shadow.
accessibility.interactions: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button'.
accessibility.focus: High-contrast focus rings for keyboard navigation.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make it premium and deeply tied to the Indian agricultural context, showing dignity, not charity.
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors or very subtle monochromatic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism (12-24px blur).
NEVER apply 'transition: all'. Apply transitions to specific properties (e.g., transform, opacity, background-color).
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned). Readability is key.
NEVER use emojis as icons. Use the specified icon library (@phosphor-icons/react).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions). Static is dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, overlays, or sticky headers. Ensure content beneath does not make text unreadable.
Implement the 22-language selection smartly (e.g., a nice globe or dropdown in the header).
Ensure 'data-testid' is on all interactive and informational elements for robust testing.
